summary.en: An online marketplace that digitizes the woodworking and wood-manufacturing industry.
summary.zh: 數位化木工與木製品製造產業的線上市集。

highlight.en: Cutr targets the largely offline, manual woodworking market by handling discovery, instant quoting, pricing, payments and workflow so customers upload a file and receive finished parts.
highlight.zh: Cutr 鎖定大多離線且仰賴人工的木工市場，包辦廠商媒合、即時報價、定價、付款與流程，讓客戶只需上傳檔案就能收到完成的零件。

summary.en: An AI-powered corporate travel management platform that replaces traditional travel agents.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的企業差旅管理平台，取代傳統旅行社。

highlight.en: SkyLink lets employees book trips as easily as sending a Slack message, using route optimization to cut costs and simplify corporate travel decisions.
highlight.zh: SkyLink 讓員工像傳 Slack 訊息一樣輕鬆訂行程，透過路線優化降低成本並簡化企業差旅決策。

summary.en: Enlightra builds fingertip-sized multicolor lasers for ultrafast data transmission.
summary.zh: Enlightra 打造指尖大小的多色雷射，用於超高速資料傳輸。

highlight.en: Its mass-manufacturable multicolor lasers enable ultrafast data communication and optical computing while improving energy efficiency and cost by up to 10x.
highlight.zh: 其可量產的多色雷射可實現超高速資料通訊與光學運算，同時將能源效率與成本最多改善 10 倍。

summary.en: A one-click checkout and AI sales assistant for Latin American e-commerce.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲電商打造的一鍵結帳與 AI 銷售助理。

highlight.en: Compra Rápida offers a headless, network-wide checkout that lets shoppers buy at any member store without lengthy forms, plus AI to automate sales and cart-recovery flows.
highlight.zh: Compra Rápida 提供跨網路的無頭結帳，讓買家在任一加盟商店免填冗長表單即可購買，並以 AI 自動化銷售與購物車挽回流程。

summary.en: A self-hosted data lakehouse platform that unifies data for large-scale analytics.
summary.zh: 自架式資料湖倉平台，統整資料以進行大規模分析。

highlight.en: IOMETE runs entirely inside the customer's own environment—on-prem, public or private cloud—to maximize data security, privacy and ownership while reducing cost.
highlight.zh: IOMETE 完全在客戶自有環境中運行，無論是地端、公有雲或私有雲，以最大化資料安全、隱私與所有權並降低成本。

summary.en: Carbon Crusher builds carbon-negative roads by recycling old materials with lignin binder.
summary.zh: Carbon Crusher 以再生舊料搭配木質素黏合劑，打造負碳道路。

highlight.en: By crushing and reusing old road materials and replacing heavy oil with carbon-binding lignin, its Crushing-as-a-Service removes about 1.5 tonnes of CO2 per 100 feet of road.
highlight.zh: 透過粉碎並再利用舊路料、以固碳木質素取代重油，其「粉碎即服務」每 100 英尺道路可移除約 1.5 公噸二氧化碳。

summary.en: An AI-native operating system that automates operations for home service businesses.
summary.zh: 為居家服務業者打造、自動化營運的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Broccoli's AI agents answer calls 24/7, book jobs in real time, follow up on leads and alert techs to emergencies, growing to 800+ contractors in under two years.
highlight.zh: Broccoli 的 AI 代理全天候接聽電話、即時排程、跟進潛在客戶並在緊急狀況通知技師，不到兩年就服務逾 800 家承包商。

summary.en: Theneo generates Stripe-quality API documentation in just a few clicks using AI.
summary.zh: Theneo 以 AI 數鍵生成媲美 Stripe 品質的 API 文件。

highlight.en: Theneo brings next-gen, AI-assisted API documentation that produces Stripe-like docs in seconds instead of manual writing.
highlight.zh: Theneo 帶來新世代 AI 輔助的 API 文件，幾秒就能產出 Stripe 風格的文件，免去人工撰寫。

summary.en: Serif Health offers healthcare price transparency APIs and data products.
summary.zh: Serif Health 提供醫療價格透明化的 API 與資料產品。

highlight.en: Serif turns newly public price-transparency data—hard to ingest and organize—into intelligence products and APIs that reveal the true cost of care.
highlight.zh: Serif 將新近公開、難以擷取與整理的價格透明化資料，轉化為揭示真實醫療成本的情報產品與 API。

summary.en: Nira is a map tool that helps renewable developers find the best grid sites.
summary.zh: Nira 是協助再生能源開發商尋找最佳併網場址的地圖工具。

highlight.en: Nira shows available capacity at every interconnection point on the electrical grid, so developers like AES and Cypress Creek can site the most profitable projects.
highlight.zh: Nira 顯示電網上每個併網點的可用容量，讓 AES、Cypress Creek 等開發商能選出最具獲利潛力的專案場址。

summary.en: Selia is an online platform connecting people with certified psychologists and psychiatrists.
summary.zh: Selia 是連結民眾與認證心理師及精神科醫師的線上平台。

highlight.en: Selia delivers one-on-one video therapy plus self-guided tools, journaling and mood tracking to serve growing mental health demand among Spanish-speaking Latam users.
highlight.zh: Selia 提供一對一視訊治療，並結合自助工具、日記與情緒追蹤，以滿足拉美西語族群日益增長的心理健康需求。

summary.en: Gym Class is a social platform for playing and creating games across VR and mobile.
summary.zh: Gym Class 是橫跨 VR 與行動裝置、用來遊玩及創作遊戲的社交平台。

highlight.en: Gym Class lets users play games, make friends and build and share their own experiences within a community spanning virtual reality and mobile.
highlight.zh: Gym Class 讓使用者在橫跨虛擬實境與行動裝置的社群中遊玩、結交朋友，並打造與分享自己的體驗。

summary.en: Skillza builds simple classroom tools for teachers and schools across MEA.
summary.zh: Skillza 為中東與非洲的教師及學校打造簡易的課堂工具。

highlight.en: Its flagship Quest tool lets teachers create, distribute and grade assessments in seconds, saving hours daily so they can focus on teaching.
highlight.zh: 其旗艦工具 Quest 讓教師幾秒內就能建立、發送與評分測驗，每天省下數小時，得以專注於教學。

summary.en: Miggos is a wholesale marketplace for mom-and-pop clothing shops in Latin America.
summary.zh: Miggos 是服務拉丁美洲小型服飾店的批發市集。

highlight.en: Miggos connects brands and manufacturers to over 5 million small clothing retailers, handling purchasing, discovery, credit and logistics in one place.
highlight.zh: Miggos 將品牌與製造商連結至逾 500 萬家小型服飾零售商，一站式包辦採購、選品、信貸與物流。

summary.en: Fintelite provides AI-powered intelligent process automation for lending.
summary.zh: Fintelite 為放貸業務提供 AI 驅動的智慧流程自動化。

highlight.en: Fintelite's AI analyzes bank statements and enriches transaction data to speed loan approvals, reduce fraud and optimize risk for lenders.
highlight.zh: Fintelite 的 AI 分析銀行對帳單並豐富交易資料，協助放貸機構加速核貸、降低詐欺並優化風險。

summary.en: PayCaddy is an API-based banking-as-a-service platform for Latin America.
summary.zh: PayCaddy 是面向拉丁美洲、以 API 為基礎的銀行即服務平台。

highlight.en: Instead of building fintech from scratch or using legacy banks, companies use PayCaddy to open KYC'd digital wallets, automate payments and issue branded debit and prepaid cards.
highlight.zh: 企業無需從零打造金融科技或仰賴傳統銀行，即可用 PayCaddy 開設含 KYC 的數位錢包、自動化付款並發行客製化簽帳金融卡與預付卡。

summary.en: Vendy is a marketplace that runs entirely on WhatsApp.
summary.zh: Vendy 是完全在 WhatsApp 上運作的市集。

highlight.en: Vendy gives sellers customized WhatsApp shops where buyers browse inventory, order with automated invoicing and pay—all without any app download or sign-up.
highlight.zh: Vendy 為賣家提供客製化的 WhatsApp 商店，買家可瀏覽庫存、自動開立發票下單並付款，全程無需下載 App 或註冊。

summary.en: Rank provides group financing to small businesses across Africa.
summary.zh: Rank 為非洲各地的小型企業提供團體融資。

highlight.en: Rank lends to SMBs in groups where collective responsibility acts as collateral and social pressure drives repayment, hitting 99% repayment across 11,000 loans.
highlight.zh: Rank 以團體方式放貸給中小企業，由集體責任作為擔保、同儕壓力促成還款，11,000 筆貸款達成 99% 的還款率。

summary.en: Topship is a logistics platform for African merchants importing and exporting goods.
summary.zh: Topship 是為非洲商家進出口貨物打造的物流平台。

highlight.en: Building 'Flexport for Africa,' Topship aims to be a global distribution system that makes shipping parcels, cargo and freight easy for African businesses.
highlight.zh: Topship 以打造「非洲版 Flexport」為目標，志在成為讓非洲企業輕鬆寄送包裹、貨物與貨運的全球配送系統。

summary.en: QUIK is building an operating system for businesses and consumers in Latin America.
summary.zh: QUIK 為拉丁美洲的企業與消費者打造作業系統。

highlight.en: QUIK pairs a consumer super app delivering food, groceries and goods in 30 minutes with QUIK Pro software that gives businesses websites, inventory and logistics in sync.
highlight.zh: QUIK 一邊以超級 App 在 30 分鐘內配送餐點、生鮮與商品，另一邊以 QUIK Pro 軟體為商家提供同步的網站、庫存與物流管理。

summary.en: amiloz is a micro-lending platform serving consumers in Mexico.
summary.zh: amiloz 是服務墨西哥消費者的微型貸款平台。

highlight.en: Led by talent from Capital One, Konfio and Klarna, amiloz focuses on improving customers' financial lives and embeds AI to build the largest consumer fintech in Mexico and LatAm.
highlight.zh: 由來自 Capital One、Konfío、Klarna 等公司的人才領軍，amiloz 專注於改善客戶財務生活，並導入 AI，志在打造墨西哥與拉美最大的消費金融科技平台。

summary.en: Marathon Education provides live after-school tutoring to K-12 students in Vietnam.
summary.zh: Marathon Education 為越南的 K-12 學生提供即時的課後輔導。

highlight.en: Marathon offers live interactive online classes in large- and small-group formats, taking on Vietnam's $5bn offline tutoring market with top teachers.
highlight.zh: Marathon 以大班與小班形式提供即時互動的線上課程，集結頂尖師資，搶攻越南 50 億美元的線下補教市場。

summary.en: Finku is an AI-powered personal finance app for Indonesia.
summary.zh: Finku 是面向印尼的 AI 驅動個人理財 App。

highlight.en: Built for markets without Open Banking, Finku helps users understand spending behavior and offers a virtual financial assistant and goal-based suggestions to over a million Indonesians.
highlight.zh: Finku 為缺乏開放銀行的市場打造，協助使用者了解消費行為，並向逾百萬印尼用戶提供虛擬理財助理與目標導向建議。

summary.en: Impossible Metals builds underwater robots that collect battery metals responsibly.
summary.zh: Impossible Metals 打造以負責任方式採集電池金屬的水下機器人。

highlight.en: Its underwater robotic vehicles selectively harvest polymetallic nodules rich in nickel, cobalt and copper from the seabed without harming the environment.
highlight.zh: 其水下機器載具能在不傷害環境的前提下，從海床選擇性採集富含鎳、鈷與銅的多金屬結核。

summary.en: Reforged Labs is an AI creative-intelligence agent for analyzing ad performance.
summary.zh: Reforged Labs 是分析廣告成效的 AI 創意智能代理。

highlight.en: Its Boa agent answers what ads are performing, explains why they work and recommends what creative to make next—turning intuition into insights in minutes.
highlight.zh: 其 Boa 代理能回答哪些廣告表現亮眼、解釋成效原因，並建議下一步該製作什麼素材，在數分鐘內把直覺化為洞見。

summary.en: Requestly is an open-source Postman alternative for intercepting and mocking APIs.
summary.zh: Requestly 是用於攔截與模擬 API 的開源 Postman 替代方案。

highlight.en: Requestly lets developers intercept, mock and test API responses without waiting on backend teams, with 200,000+ installs across Google, Amazon and other Fortune 500 firms.
highlight.zh: Requestly 讓開發者無需等待後端團隊即可攔截、模擬與測試 API 回應，安裝量逾 20 萬，獲 Google、Amazon 等財星 500 大企業採用。

summary.en: Cash Flow Portal is an investment management platform for real estate syndicators.
summary.zh: Cash Flow Portal 是為房地產募資人打造的投資管理平台。

highlight.en: Built by a syndicator who raised $20MM himself, it automates the painful work of DocuSigns, wire instructions and investor management for syndicators and their investors.
highlight.zh: 由曾募資 2,000 萬美元的募資人親自打造，自動化 DocuSign、匯款指示與投資人管理等繁瑣作業，服務募資人及其投資人。

summary.en: Sieve is an AI research lab building video datasets for frontier AI.
summary.zh: Sieve 是為前沿 AI 打造影片資料集的 AI 研究實驗室。

highlight.en: Sieve combines exabyte-scale video infrastructure and novel understanding techniques to produce high-quality video training data trusted by frontier AI labs and Fortune 100 companies.
highlight.zh: Sieve 結合 EB 級影片基礎設施與新穎的影片理解技術，產出高品質的影片訓練資料，獲前沿 AI 實驗室與財星百大企業信賴。

summary.en: Momento is building a full-stack auto insurer for underserved drivers in LatAm.
summary.zh: Momento 正為拉美未被充分服務的駕駛打造全端汽車保險公司。

highlight.en: Seeking a full insurance carrier license, Momento targets the $13bn opportunity of 30M+ uninsured vehicles in Mexico by fixing antiquated underwriting and inflexible payment terms.
highlight.zh: Momento 正爭取完整的保險承保牌照，透過革新陳舊核保與僵化付款條件，瞄準墨西哥逾 3,000 萬輛無保險車輛、達 130 億美元的市場機會。

summary.en: Seabound builds carbon capture equipment for ships.
summary.zh: Seabound 為船舶打造碳捕捉設備。

highlight.en: Seabound says it is the only way for existing ships to cut up to 95% of CO2 emissions and meet new global maritime regulations.
highlight.zh: Seabound 表示其設備是現有船舶減少最多 95% 二氧化碳排放、並符合全球新海事法規的唯一途徑。

summary.en: Atlas is an AI-first, all-in-one customer support platform replacing Intercom and Zendesk.
summary.zh: Atlas 是以 AI 為先、整合一體的客服平台，取代 Intercom 與 Zendesk。

highlight.en: Atlas combines ticketing, omni-channel chat, session recording, bug tracking and an AI chatbot—positioning itself as next-generation Zendesk/Intercom plus LogRocket and Linear.
highlight.zh: Atlas 整合工單、全通路對話、工作階段錄製、錯誤追蹤與 AI 聊天機器人，定位為新世代的 Zendesk／Intercom，再加上 LogRocket 與 Linear。

summary.en: Lenk is a next-generation lending and loan-origination platform for LatAm banks.
summary.zh: Lenk 是為拉美銀行打造的新世代放貸與貸款發放平台。

highlight.en: Lenk optimizes the full loan lifecycle from lead acquisition to disbursement, using automation and AI to boost efficiency and ensure compliance for financial institutions.
highlight.zh: Lenk 優化從獲客到撥款的完整貸款生命週期，運用自動化與 AI 提升效率，並協助金融機構確保合規。

summary.en: Lexter.ai builds a legal large language model for Brazil.
summary.zh: Lexter.ai 為巴西打造法律大型語言模型。

highlight.en: Lexter is the first legal LLM company in Brazil and already works with three of the country's top five law firms.
highlight.zh: Lexter 是巴西首家法律大型語言模型公司，已與該國前五大律師事務所中的三家合作。

summary.en: Magna is a token vesting and DeFi investment management platform—Carta for Web3.
summary.zh: Magna 是代幣歸屬與 DeFi 投資管理平台，定位為 Web3 版的 Carta。

highlight.en: Magna lets companies manage cap tables and distribute token equity, and is building investor infrastructure to use locked tokens as composable building blocks for DeFi lending and secondary markets.
highlight.zh: Magna 讓公司管理股權結構表並分配代幣股權，並打造投資人基礎設施，將鎖倉代幣作為可組合的元件，用於 DeFi 借貸與次級市場。

summary.en: Eventual builds an AI data engine for processing any data modality at scale.
summary.zh: Eventual 打造可大規模處理任意資料型態的 AI 資料引擎。

highlight.en: Its open-source engine Daft makes querying images, video, audio and text as intuitive as tables while coordinating external APIs and GPU clusters for production AI workloads.
highlight.zh: 其開源引擎 Daft 讓查詢圖片、影片、音訊與文字像操作資料表一樣直覺，並協調外部 API 與 GPU 叢集以支撐正式環境的 AI 工作負載。

summary.en: SnapTrade is an API that connects retail brokerage accounts to fintech apps—Plaid for trading.
summary.zh: SnapTrade 是將散戶券商帳戶連接至金融科技 App 的 API，定位為交易版的 Plaid。

highlight.en: SnapTrade provides API access to real-time account data, historical transactions and trading, so apps can build investing experiences on existing accounts without users transferring assets.
highlight.zh: SnapTrade 提供即時帳戶資料、歷史交易與下單的 API 存取，讓 App 能在既有帳戶上打造投資體驗，使用者無需轉移資產。

summary.en: Trackingplan provides automated QA and monitoring for digital analytics data.
summary.zh: Trackingplan 為數位分析資料提供自動化的品質檢測與監控。

highlight.en: Installed in minutes via a tag manager, Trackingplan models all data sent to tools like Google Analytics and Hubspot, detecting anomalies and creating an always-current data source of truth.
highlight.zh: Trackingplan 透過標籤管理工具幾分鐘即可安裝，建模所有送往 Google Analytics、Hubspot 等工具的資料，偵測異常並建立永遠最新的資料事實來源。

summary.en: Quan is an end-to-end platform to improve workplace wellbeing and team performance.
summary.zh: Quan 是改善職場身心健康與團隊績效的端到端平台。

highlight.en: Quan offers a self-assessment that pinpoints the underlying causes of poor wellbeing, then matches proven solutions for both individuals and teams.
highlight.zh: Quan 提供自我評估，找出身心健康不佳的根本原因，再為個人與團隊配對經驗證的解決方案。

summary.en: Sarus lets teams use personal data for analytics and ML safely and seamlessly.
summary.zh: Sarus 讓團隊安全且無縫地將個資用於分析與機器學習。

highlight.en: Deploying natively in data infrastructure, Sarus lets practitioners work on data they cannot see, protecting every interaction with differential privacy and saving months of compliance work.
highlight.zh: Sarus 原生部署於資料基礎設施中，讓使用者在看不到資料的情況下作業，以差分隱私保護每次互動，省下數月的合規工作。

summary.en: Agentnoon is an org design and workforce planning platform for organizational transformation.
summary.zh: Agentnoon 是推動組織轉型的組織設計與人力規劃平台。

highlight.en: Agentnoon provides a fast, flexible and intuitive platform to enable strategic decision-making in org design and workforce planning.
highlight.zh: Agentnoon 提供快速、靈活且直覺的平台，協助組織在組織設計與人力規劃上做出策略決策。

summary.en: Gauss is an AI agent that automatically lowers the cost of consumer debt.
summary.zh: Gauss 是自動降低消費者債務成本的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Gauss connects to a user's credit profile, monitors balances and offers, and automatically executes refinances or pays off expensive card balances to save interest.
highlight.zh: Gauss 連結使用者的信用檔案，監控餘額與優惠，並自動進行再融資或償還高息卡債以節省利息。

summary.en: Sekilo is building an AI-powered halal protein supply chain for Indonesian foodservice.
summary.zh: Sekilo 為印尼餐飲業打造 AI 驅動的清真蛋白質供應鏈。

highlight.en: Starting with poultry, Sekilo's asset-light layer unifies procurement, processing, cold chain and delivery, applying AI to negotiation, pricing and demand planning to improve margins.
highlight.zh: Sekilo 從家禽起步，以輕資產層整合採購、加工、冷鏈與配送，並將 AI 應用於議價、定價與需求規劃以提升利潤。

summary.en: Fieldproxy is a no-code platform to build mobile apps for managing field teams—Retool for field teams.
summary.zh: Fieldproxy 是建構行動 App 以管理外勤團隊的無程式碼平台，定位為外勤團隊版的 Retool。

highlight.en: Fieldproxy's no-code SaaS lets organizations build internal mobile apps to manage field teams of any size, aiming to be the operating system for field teams.
highlight.zh: Fieldproxy 的無程式碼 SaaS 讓組織能建立內部行動 App 以管理任何規模的外勤團隊，志在成為外勤團隊的作業系統。

summary.en: Axis is a knowledge base of regulations and officials for corporate affairs teams.
summary.zh: Axis 是為企業事務團隊打造的法規與官員知識庫。

highlight.en: Axis tells large companies which laws to comply with and which officials to get approvals from when entering foreign markets across Europe, the Middle East and Africa.
highlight.zh: Axis 告訴大型企業在進入歐洲、中東與非洲的海外市場時，需遵守哪些法律以及需取得哪些官員的核准。

summary.en: RecordBook helps SMBs manage business data, workflows and teams on mobile—Airtable for SMBs.
summary.zh: RecordBook 協助中小企業在手機上管理業務資料、流程與團隊，定位為中小企業版的 Airtable。

highlight.en: RecordBook is a one-stop mobile solution that lets small and medium businesses manage all their data, workflows and teams in their own local languages.
highlight.zh: RecordBook 是一站式行動方案，讓中小企業以自己的在地語言管理所有資料、工作流程與團隊。

summary.en: Velt is a toolkit for adding collaboration features to any product.
summary.zh: Velt 是為任何產品加入協作功能的工具包。

highlight.en: Velt lets teams drop in contextual comments, notifications, recordings, multiplayer editing, huddles and activity logs without building them from scratch.
highlight.zh: Velt 讓團隊無需從零開發，即可加入情境留言、通知、錄製、多人協作編輯、語音聚會與活動紀錄等功能。

summary.en: Cogram is an AI platform for architects, builders and engineers.
summary.zh: Cogram 是為建築師、營造商與工程師打造的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Cogram is building AI-native alternatives to the decades-old, hard-to-use software architects and engineers rely on, used by leading firms to deliver projects.
highlight.zh: Cogram 正打造 AI 原生工具，取代建築師與工程師仰賴、已有數十年歷史且難用的軟體，獲頂尖事務所用於交付專案。

summary.en: Elphinstone is a robo-advisory and wealth management platform for Pakistan.
summary.zh: Elphinstone 是面向巴基斯坦的機器人理財與財富管理平台。

highlight.en: Elphinstone is building the equivalent of 401(k)s for Pakistan as the first step toward a comprehensive national wealth management platform.
highlight.zh: Elphinstone 正為巴基斯坦打造相當於 401(k) 退休金的產品，作為建立全國綜合財富管理平台的第一步。

summary.en: Grey provides banking services for remote workers and digital nomads.
summary.zh: Grey 為遠端工作者與數位游牧族提供銀行服務。

highlight.en: Grey gives remote workers in emerging markets US, EU and UK accounts to receive salaries, save in foreign currency, convert to local currency and spend.
highlight.zh: Grey 為新興市場的遠端工作者提供美國、歐盟與英國帳戶，方便收薪、以外幣儲蓄、兌換為本地貨幣並消費。

summary.en: Tendo enables anyone in Africa to sell online with zero upfront inventory.
summary.zh: Tendo 讓非洲任何人都能零庫存上線開店。

highlight.en: Tendo's mobile app connects dropshippers to local wholesalers, letting sellers source products, resell via social commerce like WhatsApp, arrange delivery and get paid—all without risking capital.
highlight.zh: Tendo 的行動 App 將代發貨賣家連結至在地批發商，讓賣家無需冒著資金風險，即可選品、透過 WhatsApp 等社交電商轉售、安排配送並收款。

summary.en: UNISON is building a unified-reality headset to move between virtual worlds.
summary.zh: UNISON 正打造可在虛擬世界間穿梭的統一實境頭戴裝置。

highlight.en: Built by a team from Meta, Sony and Apple, UNISON's headset lets users dive into and resurface from virtual worlds with new-found value.
highlight.zh: UNISON 由來自 Meta、Sony 與 Apple 的團隊打造，其頭戴裝置讓使用者潛入虛擬世界並帶著新價值回到現實。

summary.en: Offbeast makes premium plant-based steaks with an authentic texture.
summary.zh: Offbeast 製作具真實口感的高級植物肉排。

highlight.en: Using its proprietary Cross-Fiber Assembly platform, Offbeast says over 85% of customers agree its plant-based whole-cuts have the best texture they've ever tasted.
highlight.zh: 憑藉專利的 Cross-Fiber Assembly 技術，Offbeast 表示逾 85% 的顧客認同其植物肉整塊產品具有他們嚐過最佳的口感。

summary.en: Cofactr offers cloud pre-factory logistics and procurement for electronics hardware.
summary.zh: Cofactr 為電子硬體提供雲端的廠前物流與採購服務。

highlight.en: Hardware teams use Cofactr to scale electronics from BOM through production, replacing spreadsheets and shelves with insights and on-demand infrastructure.
highlight.zh: 硬體團隊使用 Cofactr 將電子產品從料表一路擴展到量產，以洞見與隨需基礎設施取代試算表與貨架。

summary.en: Trébol provides document AI infrastructure for modern financial services.
summary.zh: Trébol 為現代金融服務提供文件 AI 基礎設施。

highlight.en: From KYB to mortgage underwriting, Trébol turns weeks of manual document processing into minutes, putting the back office on autopilot.
highlight.zh: 從企業身分驗證到房貸核保，Trébol 將原本需數週的人工文件處理縮短為數分鐘，讓後勤作業自動運行。

summary.en: Nest Genomics offers software to launch and integrate genetics into clinical care.
summary.zh: Nest Genomics 提供將遺傳學導入臨床照護的軟體。

highlight.en: Lab-agnostic, Nest lets organizations triage, consent and counsel patients for genetic testing and gives providers EMR-integrated decision support to manage genetic results.
highlight.zh: Nest 不限定實驗室，協助機構為基因檢測進行患者分流、同意與諮詢，並為醫師提供整合電子病歷的決策支援以管理基因檢測結果。

summary.en: Armilla AI provides third-party AI/LLM assessment and warranty solutions.
summary.zh: Armilla AI 提供第三方的 AI／LLM 評估與保固解決方案。

highlight.en: Backed by reinsurers Swiss Re and Greenlight Re, Armilla evaluates AI products and warranties them, helping vendors meet regulations, win enterprise RFPs and accelerate sales.
highlight.zh: 在再保業者 Swiss Re 與 Greenlight Re 的支持下，Armilla 評估 AI 產品並提供保固，協助廠商符合法規、贏得企業招標並加速銷售。

summary.en: BharatX enables white-labeled Buy-Now-Pay-Later for merchants and platforms.
summary.zh: BharatX 為商家與平台提供白標的先買後付服務。

highlight.en: Acquired by Flipkart, BharatX powers white-labeled 'Pay in 3' checkout financing across 1,000+ brands and grew 47x to $2.5M ARR in under six quarters.
highlight.zh: BharatX 被 Flipkart 收購，為逾 1,000 個品牌提供白標的「分 3 期付款」結帳融資，並在不到六季內成長 47 倍至 250 萬美元年經常性收入。

summary.en: SALT is a B2B cross-border payment and compliance platform.
summary.zh: SALT 是 B2B 跨境支付與合規平台。

highlight.en: SALT stitches business banking into a digital-first, automated end-to-end platform that eases cross-border payments and the documentation that comes with them.
highlight.zh: SALT 將商業銀行業務整合為以數位為先、自動化的端到端平台，簡化跨境支付及隨之而來的文件作業。

summary.en: AvairSense builds AI-enabled smart cameras tailored to different environments.
summary.zh: AvairSense 打造針對不同環境量身設計的 AI 智慧攝影機。

highlight.en: Its first product, Sense 1, is a smart home camera with AI built in to analyze on the edge, with plans for cameras for restaurants, factories and dealerships while owning the data pipeline.
highlight.zh: 其首款產品 Sense 1 是內建 AI、可在邊緣端分析的智慧家庭攝影機，並計畫推出餐廳、工廠與車商專用攝影機，同時掌控完整資料管線。

summary.en: RTHM provides virtual-first care for complex illnesses like Long COVID and ME/CFS.
summary.zh: RTHM 為長新冠、ME/CFS 等複雜疾病提供以虛擬看診為先的照護。

highlight.en: RTHM goes beyond symptom coping to deliver root-cause therapies and runs a clinical lab collecting deep molecular data to build AI-powered diagnostics and predict effective treatments.
highlight.zh: RTHM 不只教患者應對症狀，更提供針對根本原因的療法，並經營臨床實驗室蒐集深度分子資料，以開發 AI 診斷並預測有效療法。

summary.en: Mederva brings AI-enabled healthspan and longevity care to primary care.
summary.zh: Mederva 將 AI 驅動的健康壽命與長壽照護帶入基層醫療。

highlight.en: Mederva partners with clinics to turn lifestyle and behavior change into continuous, reimbursed care that extends healthy years of life between visits.
highlight.zh: Mederva 與診所合作，將生活方式與行為改變轉化為可申請保險給付的持續照護，延長就診之間的健康壽命。

summary.en: UpBanx provides financial services for D2C brands and content creators in Indonesia—Brex for Indonesia.
summary.zh: UpBanx 為印尼的 D2C 品牌與內容創作者提供金融服務，定位為印尼版的 Brex。

highlight.en: UpBanx lets customers open high-yield business accounts, get financing, manage transactions and launch Web3 projects, targeting 700k+ D2C brands and creators worth a $14b/year market.
highlight.zh: UpBanx 讓客戶開設高收益商業帳戶、取得融資、管理交易並推出 Web3 專案，鎖定逾 70 萬個 D2C 品牌與創作者、年規模達 140 億美元的市場。

summary.en: RedBrick AI provides rapid annotation software for medical imaging data.
summary.zh: RedBrick AI 為醫療影像資料提供快速標註軟體。

highlight.en: RedBrick helps radiology AI teams prepare high-quality datasets to train algorithms, tackling a field where over 90% of healthcare data is medical imagery yet radiologists are overburdened.
highlight.zh: RedBrick 協助放射科 AI 團隊準備高品質資料集以訓練演算法，切入醫療資料逾 90% 為影像、放射科醫師卻負荷過重的領域。

summary.en: SpadeWorks deploys AI agents that turn every call into revenue for trade businesses.
summary.zh: SpadeWorks 部署 AI 代理，為工程承包業者將每通來電轉化為營收。

highlight.en: Spadeworks' AI agents work 24/7 to answer every call, schedule jobs, send reminders and follow up, turning missed opportunities into booked revenue for trade contractors.
highlight.zh: Spadeworks 的 AI 代理全天候運作，接聽每通來電、排程工作、傳送提醒並跟進，為工程承包商將錯失的機會轉化為已預約的營收。

summary.en: Lenco is a pan-African multi-currency digital bank for businesses.
summary.zh: Lenco 是面向企業的泛非洲多幣別數位銀行。

highlight.en: Lenco lets African retail, hospitality and startup businesses pay vendors and suppliers, make cross-border payments and access growth capital from one digital bank.
highlight.zh: Lenco 讓非洲的零售、餐旅與新創企業在單一數位銀行內支付廠商與供應商、進行跨境支付並取得成長資金。

summary.en: Duplo enables instant B2B payments for businesses in Africa—Venmo for B2B.
summary.zh: Duplo 為非洲企業提供即時的 B2B 支付，定位為 B2B 版的 Venmo。

highlight.en: Duplo brings Venmo-style simplicity to business-to-business payments across Africa.
highlight.zh: Duplo 將 Venmo 般的簡便體驗帶入非洲的企業對企業支付。

summary.en: Finnix offers financial technology solutions for Indonesian creative businesses.
summary.zh: Finnix 為印尼的創意產業提供金融科技解決方案。

highlight.en: Finnix provides loans and financial management tools tailored to event organizers, agencies, concert promoters and other creative businesses in Indonesia.
highlight.zh: Finnix 為印尼的活動主辦方、代理商、演唱會主辦方等創意產業，提供量身打造的貸款與財務管理工具。

summary.en: AiSupervision is an operating system for factory production lines.
summary.zh: AiSupervision 是工廠生產線的作業系統。

highlight.en: AiSupervision tracks, manages and improves production in factories with many workers, automating what the best supervisors would do if they watched everything on the floor.
highlight.zh: AiSupervision 在工人眾多的工廠中追蹤、管理並改善生產，自動化最優秀的主管在全程監看時會做的事。

summary.en: Scout is a smart testing platform that unlocks at-home digital health diagnostics.
summary.zh: Scout 是釋放居家數位健康診斷潛力的智慧檢測平台。

highlight.en: Scout's hub, test kits and app deliver clinical-grade at-home testing at 10x lower development cost and 3x lower per-test price, backed by $16M in non-dilutive NIH and other funding.
highlight.zh: Scout 的中樞裝置、檢測套組與 App 提供臨床級的居家檢測，開發成本降低 10 倍、單次檢測價格降低 3 倍，並獲 NIH 等機構 1,600 萬美元的非稀釋性資金支持。

summary.en: Lumina is a Southeast Asian job platform now offering AI-plus-human automation services.
summary.zh: Lumina 是東南亞的求職平台，現亦提供 AI 結合人力的自動化服務。

highlight.en: With 1.5M workers and 30k companies, Lumina is expanding globally via Lumibot, an AI-plus-human-in-the-loop service that automates repetitive data ops and complex workflows.
highlight.zh: Lumina 擁有 150 萬名工作者與 3 萬家企業，正透過 Lumibot 拓展全球；該服務結合 AI 與人在迴路，自動化重複性的資料作業與複雜流程。

summary.en: WeReno is an AI platform for construction, renovation and property maintenance.
summary.zh: WeReno 是用於營造、翻修與物業維護的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Through Renobot, Handyman and Repaired sub-products, WeReno connects owners with 2,000+ vetted contractors to scope, price and execute projects from small repairs to $50M builds.
highlight.zh: WeReno 透過 Renobot、Handyman 與 Repaired 等子產品，將業主連結至逾 2,000 名經審核的承包商，從小型維修到 5,000 萬美元的建案皆可規劃、報價並執行。

summary.en: Wingback provides tools and APIs for SaaS pricing and packaging.
summary.zh: Wingback 為 SaaS 的定價與方案組合提供工具與 API。

highlight.en: Wingback is infrastructure that lets SaaS startups deploy any pricing model and lets non-technical teams change pricing and run product-led growth campaigns without engineering.
highlight.zh: Wingback 是一套基礎設施，讓 SaaS 新創部署任意定價模式，並讓非技術團隊無需工程介入即可變更定價與執行產品導向成長活動。

summary.en: Rehook.ai is an all-in-one promotion engine to run and track user incentive campaigns.
summary.zh: Rehook.ai 是執行與追蹤用戶激勵活動的一體化促銷引擎。

highlight.en: Rehook.ai's intuitive rule engine lets marketers run referrals, loyalty, rewards, coupons, leaderboards and tiers, personalizing campaigns by segment and geography without involving tech.
highlight.zh: Rehook.ai 直覺的規則引擎讓行銷人員執行推薦、忠誠度、獎勵、優惠券、排行榜與分級制度，並依客群與地區個人化活動，全程無需技術團隊介入。

summary.en: Elementary is open-source data observability for data teams.
summary.zh: Elementary 是為資料團隊打造的開源資料可觀測性方案。

highlight.en: Elementary lets data teams detect problems before their users do, with an open-source solution any data engineer can deploy in minutes without sharing sensitive data.
highlight.zh: Elementary 讓資料團隊搶在使用者之前發現問題，其開源方案讓任何資料工程師都能在數分鐘內部署，且無需分享敏感資料。

summary.en: Creizer provides revenue-based financing to online sellers in Latin America.
summary.zh: Creizer 為拉丁美洲的線上賣家提供營收型融資。

highlight.en: Creizer scores online sellers on store metrics and collects a percentage of daily sales, making financing accessible to the 80%+ of LatAm SMEs that can't get traditional loans.
highlight.zh: Creizer 依商店指標為線上賣家評分並按每日銷售比例收款，讓拉美逾 80% 無法取得傳統貸款的中小企業也能獲得融資。

summary.en: Streak is a neo-banking platform for children and teenagers in India.
summary.zh: Streak 是面向印度兒童與青少年的新型銀行平台。

highlight.en: Streak builds a gamified, personalized banking solution to redefine how children and teenagers in India relate to money.
highlight.zh: Streak 打造遊戲化、個人化的銀行方案，重新定義印度兒童與青少年與金錢的關係。

summary.en: HOKALI is a US marketplace for booking after-school and enrichment activities.
summary.zh: HOKALI 是預訂課後與才藝活動的美國市集。

highlight.en: HOKALI connects schools with high-quality vetted vendors, simplifying the booking, organizing and managing of after-school programs and camps.
highlight.zh: HOKALI 將學校連結至經審核的高品質供應商，簡化課後課程與營隊的預訂、籌辦與管理。

summary.en: Plumter builds financial tools for cross-border trade between importers and exporters.
summary.zh: Plumter 為進出口商之間的跨境貿易打造金融工具。

highlight.en: Plumter combines multi-currency and stablecoin infrastructure with AI-powered multilingual invoicing and embedded apps to make cross-border trade as easy as texting.
highlight.zh: Plumter 結合多幣別與穩定幣基礎設施、AI 驅動的多語發票及嵌入式應用，讓跨境貿易像傳訊息一樣簡單。

summary.en: Tola is a simple, fast and free tool for businesses to pay and get paid.
summary.zh: Tola 是讓企業付款與收款的簡單、快速且免費的工具。

highlight.en: Tola lets SMBs pay bills and get paid, and helps them manage cashflow by letting them buy now and pay later on expensive bills for a small fee.
highlight.zh: Tola 讓中小企業支付帳單並收款，並透過讓他們對高額帳單先買後付（收取少量費用）來協助管理現金流。

summary.en: Joe lets customers Buy Now Pay Later at any store in Europe.
summary.zh: Joe 讓消費者在歐洲任何商店都能先買後付。

highlight.en: Through its app and virtual card, Joe enables BNPL at any store without technical integration, addressing a Europe where only 15% of e-commerce offers installments.
highlight.zh: Joe 透過其 App 與虛擬卡，讓消費者在任何商店都能先買後付且無需技術整合，切入歐洲僅 15% 電商提供分期付款的市場。

summary.en: Kular is an AI lead generator that only charges for results.
summary.zh: Kular 是只按成效收費的 AI 潛在客戶開發工具。

highlight.en: Kular generates leads via email and LinkedIn for over 1,000 companies, built by a team of MIT, IIT, Cambridge and Oxford grads and charging only for results.
highlight.zh: Kular 透過電子郵件與 LinkedIn 為逾 1,000 家公司開發潛在客戶，由 MIT、IIT、劍橋與牛津的畢業生團隊打造，並僅按成效收費。

summary.en: Cypher is a crypto neo-bank letting anyone open an account and transact globally.
summary.zh: Cypher 是加密貨幣新型銀行，讓任何人都能開戶並全球交易。

highlight.en: Cypher lets users anywhere open a bank account in five minutes, transact with a crypto card and instantly send USDC worldwide, treating stablecoins as the internet moment for finance.
highlight.zh: Cypher 讓全球任何使用者在五分鐘內開設帳戶、使用加密卡交易並即時將 USDC 匯往全球，視穩定幣為金融業的網路化時刻。

summary.en: Better Opinions is a prediction market in India for trading opinions on everyday topics.
summary.zh: Better Opinions 是印度的預測市場，讓人對日常話題交易看法。

highlight.en: Better Opinions lets users trade their views on topics like cricket, politics and entertainment, aiming to make trading more relatable and improve financial literacy.
highlight.zh: Better Opinions 讓使用者對板球、政治與娛樂等話題交易看法，旨在讓交易更貼近生活並提升金融素養。

summary.en: Clupp offers innovative insurance solutions for underserved markets.
summary.zh: Clupp 為未被充分服務的市場提供創新的保險方案。

highlight.en: Clupp spans B2C coverage for bicycle and scooter riders in Latin America, B2B SaaS for insurance brokers worldwide, and new products to guarantee startup financing in the US.
highlight.zh: Clupp 涵蓋拉美自行車與滑板車騎士的 B2C 保險、面向全球保險經紀人的 B2B SaaS，以及在美國為新創融資提供擔保的新型保險產品。

summary.en: yhangry is a marketplace for booking private chefs to cook at home.
summary.zh: yhangry 是預訂私廚到府烹飪的市集。

highlight.en: For around $40 per person, yhangry lets users book a 3-course feast in a few clicks while helping chefs earn three times what they would in a restaurant.
highlight.zh: 以每人約 40 美元，yhangry 讓使用者數鍵就能預訂三道菜的盛宴，同時協助廚師賺取餐廳工作三倍的收入。

summary.en: Jutsoo is a treasury management platform connecting all corporate bank accounts in one place.
summary.zh: Jutsoo 是將所有企業銀行帳戶整合於一處的資金管理平台。

highlight.en: Jutsoo gives finance teams real-time visibility and control by unifying data from internal systems and banks, automating money movements, reconciliations and cash forecasting.
highlight.zh: Jutsoo 整合來自內部系統與銀行的資料，為財務團隊提供即時的能見度與控制，並自動化資金調度、對帳與現金預測。

summary.en: Apollo is a payments and loyalty infrastructure provider.
summary.zh: Apollo 是支付與忠誠度基礎設施供應商。

highlight.en: Apollo builds infrastructure to power payments and loyalty programs.
highlight.zh: Apollo 打造支撐支付與忠誠度方案的基礎設施。

summary.en: StafBook helps Southeast Asian SMEs simplify HR and expense management—Rippling for SEA.
summary.zh: StafBook 協助東南亞中小企業簡化人資與費用管理，定位為東南亞版的 Rippling。

highlight.en: StafBook lets business managers handle the full people lifecycle—onboarding, leave, attendance, payroll, offboarding—plus expense reimbursement and cash advances in one place.
highlight.zh: StafBook 讓管理者一站式處理完整的人事生命週期，包括入職、請假、出勤、薪資、離職，以及費用報銷與預支。

summary.en: VantedgeAI scales investing workflows with an AI agent marketplace.
summary.zh: VantedgeAI 以 AI 代理市集擴展投資工作流程。

highlight.en: Built on 15 years of running a credit hedge fund, VantedgeAI offers a marketplace of curated AI agents to help investors generate alpha, with institutional-grade security and compliance.
highlight.zh: VantedgeAI 奠基於 15 年經營信貸對沖基金的經驗，提供精選 AI 代理的市集協助投資人創造超額報酬，並具備機構級的安全與合規。

summary.en: Koala is an interactive online teaching platform that engages young children—Minecraft for teachers.
summary.zh: Koala 是吸引幼童的互動式線上教學平台，定位為教師版的 Minecraft。

highlight.en: Koala Go is an award-winning interactive platform built for online teaching businesses, designed to engage 8-year-olds in a way Zoom cannot.
highlight.zh: Koala Go 是專為線上教學業者打造的得獎互動平台，旨在以 Zoom 做不到的方式吸引八歲孩童。
